testcase.name: getAllSimCardsMapsBackendErrors
testcase.system-out:
2026-03-25T12:39:04.717+04:00 ERROR 36610 --- [ main] c.p.admin.service.MultiSimBoxService : Error fetching SIM cards
java.lang.RuntimeException: backend error: boom at com.projectD.admin.service.MultiSimBoxService.lambda$getAllSimCards$0(MultiSimBoxService.java:35) ~[classes/:na] Suppressed: reactor.core.publisher.FluxOnAssembly$OnAssemblyException: Error has been observed at the following site(s): *__checkpoint ⇢ 500 INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR from GET http://localhost:8080/api/sim-cards [DefaultWebClient] Original Stack Trace: at com.projectD.admin.service.MultiSimBoxService.lambda$getAllSimCards$0(MultiSimBoxService.java:35) ~[classes/:na] at testcase.name: getAllSimCardsTimesOutWhenBackendDoesNotRespond
testcase.system-out:
2026-03-25T12:39:04.746+04:00 ERROR 36610 --- [ main] c.p.admin.service.MultiSimBoxService : Error fetching SIM cards
java.util.concurrent.TimeoutException: Did not observe any item or terminal signal within 10000ms in 'flatMapMany' (and no fallback has been configured) at reactor.core.publisher.FluxTimeout$TimeoutMainSubscriber.handleTimeout(FluxTimeout.java:296) ~[reactor-core-3.7.4.jar:3.7.4] at reactor.core.publisher.FluxTimeout$TimeoutMainSubscriber.doTimeout(FluxTimeout.java:281) ~[reactor-core-3.7.4.jar:3.7.4] at reactor.core.publisher.FluxTimeout$TimeoutTimeoutSubscriber.onNext(FluxTimeout.java:420) ~[reactor-core-3.7.4.jar:3.7.4] at reactor.core.publisher.FluxOnErrorReturn$ReturnSubscriber.onNext(FluxOnErrorReturn.java:162) ~[reactor-core-3.7.4.jar:3.7.4] at reactor.core.publisher.MonoDelay$MonoDelayRunnable.propagateDelay(MonoDelay.java:270) ~[reactor-core-3.7.4.jar:3.7.4] at reactor.core.publisher.MonoDelay$MonoDelayRunnable.run(MonoDelay.java:285) ~[reactor-core-3.7.4.jar:3.7.4] at reactor.test.scheduler.VirtualTimeScheduler.drain(VirtualTimeScheduler.java:405) ~[reactor-test-3.7.4.jar:3.7.4] at reactor.test.scheduler.VirtualTimeScheduler.advanceTime(VirtualTimeScheduler.java:379) ~[reactor-test-3.7.4.jar:3.7.4] at reactor.test.scheduler.VirtualTimeScheduler.advanceTimeBy(VirtualTimeScheduler.java:284) ~[reactor-test-3.7.4.jar:3.7.4] at reactor.test.DefaultStepVerifierBuilder$WaitEvent.run(DefaultStepVerifierBuilder.java:2453) ~[reactor-test-3.7.4.jar:3.7.4] at reactor.test.DefaultStepVerifierBuilder$DefaultVerifySubscriber.pollTaskEventOrComplete(DefaultStepVerifierBuilder.java:1719) ~[reactor-test-3.7.4.jar:3.7.4] at com.projectD.admin.service.MultiSimBoxServiceTest.getAllSimCardsTimesOutWhenBackendDoesNotRespond(MultiSimBoxServiceTest.java:55) ~[test-classes/:na] at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke0(Native Method) ~[na:na] at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(NativeMethodAccessorImpl.java:77) ~[na:na] at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.java:43) ~[na:na] at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:568) ~[na:na] at
